comment: External-app observation baselines (scripts/bakeoff-ratchet.mjs), never package capability or fidelity claims. Each pinned app runs with custom migration config and Jest-era shims, so counts measure app + dependency pins + setup + shims + vitest-native as a unit. A change opens an investigation; it does not prove a vitest-native regression or that a behavior is unsupported. Package-owned conformance, crosscheck, consumer, and version-matrix suites define support. NEVER quote these internal counts in docs or positioning. Raise baselines deliberately with --update after an improvement; lowering one requires a hand edit with a written justification. bakeoffsRepoSha pins danfry1/vitest-native-bakeoffs, which pins each app commit.
